name: Service Installed By Unusual Client - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tim Rauch (Nextron Systems), Elastic (idea)
SIGMA Title: Service Installed By Unusual Client - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects a service installed by a client which has PID 0 or whose parent has PID 0

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%clientprocessid%0%' OR "Parent Process ID"=0) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Service Installed By Unusual Client - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%clientprocessid%0%' OR "Parent Process ID"=0) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Service Installed By Unusual Client - Security
